string 2:
O child of fate, bound to the endless cycle of death and rebirth...
Thou hast been granted the chance to atone.
Choose a figure suitable for fulfilling thy mission.
Type L
Type R

Inscribe for thyself a new name, and thou shalt be reborn
into the world.
Confirm
Start Over

Take your seat and wait for the show to start. "A story about 
the natural laws of the world" is about to begin.
Agent Alpha
Production OcculTokyo TV

Uh-oh. Looks like we've been overdoing it a little lately.
The world is starting to wake up to our existence.

Ironic, really. A secret organization that hunts down urban
legends is becoming an urban legend in its own right...

If that anime you just saw gets too popular, you can forget
about going around dressed like that anymore.

I'll go ahead and put in a request for budget for a new uniform,
but for this mission you'll need to keep a low profile.
Is that clear, Agent {player}?

Now, then. Are you already aware of the anomalous phenomena
that have been observed in this city?
Of course I am.{next}
Anomalous phenomena?
Who are you again?

Inexplicable explosions, sightings of mysterious lifeforms, localized earthquakes,
abnormal weather patterns... There's no shortage of strange reports.

All typical anomalies, so it's time for ADAMAS to step in.
The top brass have high hopes for us, I'm told.
Especially after our last mission...

They were particularly pleased with our investigation of the unidentified
weapons loaded with technology far surpassing current human levels.
So I'm hoping we can make this mission a repeat performance.

You know, paranormal occurences that can't be explained by today's science.
It's our specialty, remember?

Similar phenomena have been confirmed in Japan's Shinjuku area.
It's a routine mission, you know the drill.
I know it's been a while, but come on.

I relay orders and info from HQ, and you handle the
investigation in the field.

Regulations forbid me from sharing my name, but you can
call me "Operator," as usual.

Getting back to the mission... Are you already aware of the
anomalous phenomena that have been observed in this city?
Understood.{next}
Repeat performance?
ADAMAS?

I'll send the coordinates to your Digivice. Check your
map and approach the target location.

Again, don't blow your cover. And let's pray that the anime
from earlier doesn't become too popular.
Now, then. It's time to start the mission. I'm counting on you.

I personally wasn't satisifed with the results of our last mission, 
since we let the target escape at the last minute...

...but the higher-ups really value the data we obtained during
the mission. Hence, their high hopes for us today.

Our organization. ADAMAS is a special investigation bureau that
looks into these kinds of anomalies away from the public eye.

This mission is no exception, of course, so do take utmost care
to maintain secrecy and remain hidden.
I see you've reached the specified coordinates. Give me a sitrep.
A crowd has been confirmed around the target coordinates.{next}
Is this some kind of protest?
What exactly is that wall?

Yes, apparently. The government never fully explained why they
closed off Nishi-Shinjuku with the Wall of Hope.

The official explanation is that some equipment exploded at
an underground construction site...

But a wall of this scale, for something like that? That clearly doesn't
add up—hence the angry crowd demanding some real answers.

It's called the "Wall of Hope." There was a big, mysterious
explosion in Nishi-Shinjuku eight years ago.

The Wall was built just after that, ostensibly for public safety,
but the truth remains murky.

The phenomena we've been sent to investigate are seen most often around
this wall. Best to assume we'll be investigating what's on the inside as well.
You can really feel the fear and anger of the crowd.

Our studies indicate an odd correlation between an increase in the
frequency of anomalies and heightened social unrest.

Anomalies have been occurring exponentially more often of late,
at a rate only seen a handful of times in history.

And though we aren't sure why, almost all those precedents were
accompanied by complete societal collapse...
...be it from an epidemic, a natural disaster... even war.

That's why we're in such a hurry. But, in our haste, I'm afraid
we've alerted the world to our existence...

Nevertheless, our ultimate mission is to uncover the causality between
these anomalies, and the horrible tragedies that follow.
Try investigating that area a little further.
*screaming*
Are you all right?!
That tremor just now was likely one of our anomalous phenomena.

I managed to narrow the target coordinates down, thanks to
some videos from eight years ago.

Footage of the anomaly in this district was uploaded to the
internet back then by some civilians.

The actual videos have since been removed, but the comments still
remain, and they tell us that those videos...

...were all recorded in areas that are now on the inside of that
Wall.
Check again to see if there isn't some way to get beyond that Wall.

An update. I'm sending you an additional mission. Someone is
requesting aid near the target coordinates.
That person had already been approved to contact your Digivice.

Normally I'd assume that to mean they're a member of the organization...
At any rate, do what you can to keep whoever it is safe.
Copy that. Continuing the mission.{next}
It seems you've discovered some phase electron lifeforms.

Phase electron lifeforms are mysterious organisms often found in
the vicinity of anomalies.

ADAMAS has been studying them for years, but the truth of their
nature still eludes us.

The analysis department at HQ finally decided on a name for these
creatures in a report they put out the other day.

Going forward, they're to be referred to as "Digital Monsters,"
or "Digimon" for short!

Naturally, we won't send you out defenseless. I'll transmit
some firepower to you right now.

The connection will only allow me to send one, however,
so make your choice.
Patamon.
DemiDevimon.
Gomamon.
Reinforcements have been pre-loaded onto your Digivice.

If you end up in a battle, don't hesitate.
You must complete your mission.
Contact with hostile Digimon confirmed!
Digivice activated! Execute the Digimon Summoning Program!

The target coordinates are just ahead... but there appears
to be an obstacle in your path.
Your Digimon should be able to remove it easily. Give it a try.
Graaaaagh!
Hey, over here!
Come on!
This way! Run!
Fsssh! Fsssh!
Hrrrrrnh... Graaagh!
Graaaaagh!
GRAAAAAAAGH!
Hurry...!
Hnnnh...!
Graaaaagh...
Hrnh... Hrnh...!
Fsssh! Fsssh!
Whew!
Okay.
Let's go!
Thank goodness we finally found each other again!
Did you call for help? What're you doing here?{next}
Do we know each other?{next}
It's almost as if we were destined to meet.{next}
What do you mean? I was trying to catch up with you, of course!

Huh...? Enough with the jokes, already. Now is hardly the time,
don't you think?
Y-Yeah, I suppose it is, in a sense... But please, phrasing!
Hey. Where did he go? Wasn't he with you?

Well... maybe he went on ahead. C'mon. We need to hurry up
to the roof of the government building!
The roof of the government building?{next}
Who are you?{next}
"He," who? Who are you talking about?{next}

Seriously, what's with you?! I mean, isn't a war supposed
to break out?!

We have to get to the roof of the Tokyo Metropolitan 
Government Building!

I'm guessing... She's the target for our additional mission.
She's not making a whole lot of sense though...
It's highly probable that she's been affected by an anomaly.

What I still want to know, though, is why she was already
approved to contact your Digivice.

I'll check the database again. If I learn anything, I'll be
in touch right away.

Even though she piques my interest... we need to do something
about that giant Digimon first.

We can't allow it into the city. For now, please proceed with
the primary mission.
Roger. Securing the target and continuing on!{next}
